'''zhafopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whateverness|whateverness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-f-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whateverness|whateverness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhafopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæfepeth|zhæfepeth]] || [[word:zhæfepej|zhæfepej]] || [[word:zhæfepesh|zhæfepesh]] || [[word:zhæfepe|zhæfepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhafofopoth|zhafofopoth]] || [[word:zhafofopoj|zhafofopoj]] || [[word:zhafofoposh|zhafofoposh]] || [[word:zhafofopo|zhafofopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhafopoth|zhafopoth]] || [[word:zhafopoj|zhafopoj]] || [[word:zhafoposh|zhafoposh]] || [[word:zhafopo|zhafopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhafofpoth|zhafofpoth]] || [[word:zhafofpoj|zhafofpoj]] || [[word:zhafofposh|zhafofposh]] || [[word:zhafofpof|zhafofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhafopotho|zhafopotho]] || [[word:zhafopojo|zhafopojo]] || [[word:zhafoposho|zhafoposho]] || [[word:zhafopoko|zhafopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhafopoth|zhafopoth]] || [[word:zhafopoj|zhafopoj]] || [[word:zhafoposh|zhafoposh]] || [[word:zhafopo|zhafopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhafopothol|zhafopothol]] || [[word:zhafopojol|zhafopojol]] || [[word:zhafoposhol|zhafoposhol]] || [[word:zhafopokol|zhafopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhafopothotho|zhafopothotho]] || [[word:zhafopojojo|zhafopojojo]] || [[word:zhafoposhosho|zhafoposhosho]] || [[word:zhafopoko|zhafopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhafopothon|zhafopothon]] || [[word:zhafopojon|zhafopojon]] || [[word:zhafoposhon|zhafoposhon]] || [[word:zhafopokon|zhafopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhafopothoro|zhafopothoro]] || [[word:zhafopojoro|zhafopojoro]] || [[word:zhafoposhoro|zhafoposhoro]] || [[word:zhafopokoro|zhafopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
